channel.title: Modal Labs
channel.description: Modal Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Inkling by Thinking Machines now available on Modal
item.description: Inkling, a general-purpose multimodal model by Thinking Machines, along with a custom trained DFlash speculator, is now available on Modal.

item.title: Scaling to 1 million concurrent sandboxes in seconds
item.description: How (and why) we built a scheduling system that can scale to 1 million concurrent sandboxes (per workspace) in seconds.

item.title: Devin Outposts on Modal
item.description: Devin, built by Cognition, is an AI software engineer: it plans, writes, tests, and ships code semi-autonomously. With Outposts, Devin can now run its work in Modal sandboxes.
